caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring a patterned neckline with red and white embroidery and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular logo accompanies the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains a consistent position, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. Her facial expressions shift slightly as she speaks, moving from an open-mouthed speaking pose to a more neutral expression with her lips slightly parted. Her hands move fluidly, shifting from an open position in front of her chest to a slightly more raised posture, while her gaze remains directed forward toward the viewer.
